panels.title: Team Rolling Avg Distance (km) Over Time
panels.description: 5-game rolling average of team distance, lower is better

targets.rawSql: SELECT g.played_at AS time, AVG(gu.distance_km) OVER (ORDER BY g.played_at ROWS BETWEEN 4 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS rolling_avg_dist_km FROM geoguessr.games g JOIN geoguessr.guesses gu ON g.game_id = gu.game_id GROUP BY g.game_id, g.played_at ORDER BY g.played_at

panels.title: Player Rolling Avg Distance Over Time

targets.rawSql: SELECT g.played_at AS time, gu.player_name, AVG(gu.distance_km) OVER (PARTITION BY gu.player_name ORDER BY g.played_at ROWS BETWEEN 4 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS rolling_avg FROM geoguessr.games g JOIN geoguessr.guesses gu ON g.game_id = gu.game_id ORDER BY g.played_at

panels.title: Guess Time vs Distance (clicked guesses only)
panels.description: Scatter plot: speed vs accuracy per player. Excludes timeouts (score=0, dist>10000km)

targets.rawSql: SELECT gu.time_seconds, gu.distance_km, gu.player_name FROM geoguessr.guesses gu WHERE gu.time_seconds > 0 AND gu.score > 0 AND gu.distance_km <= 10000 ORDER BY gu.player_name

panels.title: Win Rate Over Time
panels.description: Team win rate calculated as a 10-game rolling window

targets.rawSql: SELECT played_at AS time, AVG(CASE WHEN game_won THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) OVER (ORDER BY played_at ROWS BETWEEN 9 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) * 100 AS win_rate_pct FROM geoguessr.games WHERE game_won IS NOT NULL ORDER BY played_at

WITH per_game AS (SELECT g.played_at, gu.player_name, AVG(CASE WHEN gu.correct_country_flag THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS acc FROM geoguessr.games g JOIN geoguessr.guesses gu ON g.game_id = gu.game_id WHERE gu.correct_country_flag IS NOT NULL GROUP BY g.game_id, g.played_at, gu.player_name) SELECT played_at AS time, player_name, AVG(acc) OVER (PARTITION BY player_name ORDER BY played_at ROWS BETWEEN 9 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) * 100 AS country_acc_pct FROM per_game ORDER BY played_at

panels.title: Countries Worth Studying
panels.description: Countries with worst average distance, weighted by frequency. Min 3 guesses.

targets.rawSql: SELECT r.pano_country_name AS country, ROUND(AVG(gu.distance_km)::numeric, 1) AS avg_dist_km, COUNT(*) AS guess_count, ROUND((AVG(gu.distance_km) * LN(COUNT(*) + 1))::numeric, 1) AS importance FROM geoguessr.guesses gu JOIN geoguessr.rounds r ON gu.game_id = r.game_id AND gu.round_number = r.round_number WHERE r.pano_country_name IS NOT NULL AND r.pano_country_name != '' AND r.pano_country_name != 'Unknown' GROUP BY r.pano_country_name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY importance DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Countries I Confuse
panels.description: Most common country confusion pairs (actual -> guessed)

targets.rawSql: SELECT gu.player_name, r.pano_country_name AS actual_country, gu.guessed_country AS guessed, COUNT(*) AS times FROM geoguessr.guesses gu JOIN geoguessr.rounds r ON gu.game_id = r.game_id AND gu.round_number = r.round_number WHERE gu.correct_country_flag = false AND r.pano_country_name IS NOT NULL AND r.pano_country_name != '' AND gu.guessed_country IS NOT NULL AND gu.guessed_country != '' AND gu.guessed_country != 'Unknown' AND gu.guessed_country != 'Lost at Sea' ORDER BY times DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Best Countries (Lowest Avg Distance)
panels.description: Countries with best accuracy per player, min 3 guesses

targets.rawSql: SELECT gu.player_name, r.pano_country_name AS country, ROUND(AVG(gu.distance_km)::numeric, 1) AS avg_dist_km, COUNT(*) AS guesses, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN gu.correct_country_flag THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END)::numeric * 100, 1) AS correct_pct FROM geoguessr.guesses gu JOIN geoguessr.rounds r ON gu.game_id = r.game_id AND gu.round_number = r.round_number WHERE r.pano_country_name IS NOT NULL AND r.pano_country_name != '' GROUP BY gu.player_name, r.pano_country_name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY avg_dist_km ASC LIMIT 30

panels.title: Move vs No-Move: Avg Distance
panels.description: Performance comparison by movement mode per player

targets.rawSql: SELECT gu.player_name, g.move_mode, ROUND(AVG(gu.distance_km)::numeric, 1) AS avg_dist_km FROM geoguessr.games g JOIN geoguessr.guesses gu ON g.game_id = gu.game_id WHERE g.move_mode IS NOT NULL AND g.move_mode != '' GROUP BY gu.player_name, g.move_mode ORDER BY gu.player_name, g.move_mode

panels.title: Speed Ranking (Avg Guess Time)
panels.description: Average time per guess by player, excludes timeouts. Shows % of clicked guesses.

targets.rawSql: SELECT player_name, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN score > 0 AND distance_km <= 10000 THEN time_seconds END)::numeric, 1) AS avg_time_sec, COUNT(CASE WHEN score > 0 AND distance_km <= 10000 THEN 1 END) AS clicked_guesses, COUNT(*) AS total_guesses, ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN score > 0 AND distance_km <= 10000 THEN 1 END)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100, 1) AS click_rate_pct FROM geoguessr.guesses WHERE time_seconds > 0 GROUP BY player_name ORDER BY avg_time_sec ASC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT game_id) AS total_games, COUNT(*) AS total_guesses, COUNT(DISTINCT player_name) AS players, ROUND(AVG(distance_km)::numeric, 1) AS avg_dist_km, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN correct_country_flag THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END)::numeric * 100, 1) AS country_acc_pct FROM geoguessr.guesses
